import { DumiDemoGrid } from 'dumi';
import { Link } from 'dumi';

import LoadingComponent from '@@/dumi/theme/loading';
import React, { Suspense } from 'react';
import { DumiPage, useTabMeta, useRouteMeta } from 'dumi';

function DumiMarkdownInner() {
  const { texts: $$contentTexts } = useRouteMeta();

  return <><div className="markdown"><h2 id="扩展-react-markdown-使用"><a aria-hidden="true" tabIndex="-1" href="#扩展-react-markdown-使用"><span className="icon icon-link" /></a>{"扩展 react-markdown 使用"}</h2><SourceCode lang="tsx">{$$contentTexts[0].value}</SourceCode></div></>;

// ref: https://github.com/pmmmwh/react-refresh-webpack-plugin/blob/main/docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md#edits-always-lead-to-full-reload
function DumiMarkdownContent() {
  // wrap suspense for catch async meta data
  return <DumiPage><Suspense fallback={<LoadingComponent />}><DumiMarkdownInner /></Suspense></DumiPage>;
}

export default DumiMarkdownContent;
